active_card.recent_activity_empty: Complete your first workout to see recent activity.

gzclp.name: GZCLP
gzclp.description: How to train on Kaio-sama's planet: linear progression under constant pressure. 4-day rotation with T1, T2, and T3 exercises. Fail a lift and you switch stages and keep fighting. Inspired by Cody LeFever's GZCL method.

hexan-ppl.name: HeXaN PPL
hexan-ppl.description: Six days of Kaioken: push your body to the limit with strength and volume. Push/Pull/Legs combining 5/3/1 on the main compounds with double progression on accessories. Inspired by HeXaN's methodology.

stronglifts-5x5.name: StrongLifts 5x5
stronglifts-5x5.description: A classic beginner strength program. Two alternating workouts (A/B), 3 days per week. Squat every session, linear progression of +2.5 kg per workout (+5 kg on deadlift). Three consecutive failures trigger a 10% deload.

phraks-greyskull-lp.name: Phrak's Greyskull LP
phraks-greyskull-lp.description: Phrakture's beginner strength program. Two alternating workouts (A/B), 3 days per week. Every exercise ends with an AMRAP set (to technical failure). Linear progression with a 10% deload on failure.

531-boring-but-big.name: 5/3/1 Boring But Big
531-boring-but-big.description: Master Roshi's secret to strength: boring reps, huge results. 4-week cycles (5s, 3s, 5/3/1, deload) with 5×10 supplemental volume. 4 days per week. Inspired by Jim Wendler's 5/3/1 BBB.

531-for-beginners.name: 5/3/1 for Beginners
531-for-beginners.description: Full-body training at Kami's Lookout: 3 days per week, two main lifts per session. 3-week cycles (5s, 3s, 5/3/1) with FSL 5×5 as supplemental work. Methodical and balanced. Inspired by Jim Wendler's 5/3/1 for Beginners.

phul.name: PHUL
phul.description: Strength and size like Vegeta in his gravity chamber: two days of pure power (heavy compounds, 3–5 reps) and two of hypertrophy (8–12 reps). 4 days per week. Inspired by Brandon Campbell's PHUL.

nivel-7.name: Level 7
nivel-7.description: A 12-week strength program with reverse periodization. You set your target record (week 6) and weights are calculated backwards. Block 1 (5×5) with a deload in week 3, Block 2 (3×3) peaking at the record. Cycle 2 repeats the wave with +2.5 kg. Accessories use double progression 3×8–12. 4 days/week: shoulders/triceps, back/calves, chest/biceps, legs.

caparazon-de-tortuga.name: Turtle Shell
caparazon-de-tortuga.description: Your training at Kame House: start from zero with bodyweight and gradually add the bar. 200 sessions, 3 days/week. 4 blocks per session: Core, Activation, Proprioception, and the Fundamental Lift. Inspired by Amerigo Brunetti's methodology.

365-programmare-lipertrofia.name: 365 Programmare l'Ipertrofia
365-programmare-lipertrofia.description: Amerigo Brunetti's year-long hypertrophy program, structured in 5 phases across 212 sessions. Phase Zero (8 weeks): technique with minimal loads. Phase T1 (6 weeks): introducing load on the three fundamental lifts. Phase PN (13 weeks): progressive ramping with specific overloads. Phase JAW (18 weeks): 3 independent intensification blocks with their own TMs and a 1RM test at the end of each. Phase IS (12 weeks): isolation and consolidation work, 12–30 reps. 4 days per week.

la-sala-del-tiempo.name: Hyperbolic Time Chamber
la-sala-del-tiempo.description: Inspired by Amerigo Brunetti's methodology. Your year in the Hyperbolic Time Chamber: 196 sessions of hypertrophy structured in 4 phases of increasing intensity (T1, PN, JAW, IS). Only for warriors who already own the squat, bench press, and deadlift. 4 days per week.

sala-del-tiempo-1.name: Hyperbolic Time Chamber 1
sala-del-tiempo-1.description: Phase T1 — Perfezionamento Tecnico: 24 sessions of technique with light loads (40–70% TM). Isometrics, tempos, and movement control on the squat, bench press, and deadlift. 6 weeks, 4 days/week. Inspired by Amerigo Brunetti's methodology.

sala-del-tiempo-2.name: Hyperbolic Time Chamber 2
sala-del-tiempo-2.description: Phase PN — Potenziamento Neurale: 52 sessions of progressive neural potentiation (60–95% TM). Load ramping and strength sets to carry technique over to heavier weights. 13 weeks, 4 days/week. Inspired by Amerigo Brunetti's methodology.

sala-del-tiempo-3.name: Hyperbolic Time Chamber 3
sala-del-tiempo-3.description: Phase JAW Mod — 72 sessions of intensification across 3 six-week blocks (60 → 70 → 80% TM). Each block ends with a 1RM test that feeds the next block's TM. 18 weeks, 4 days/week. Inspired by Amerigo Brunetti's methodology.

tenkaichi-budokai-sentadilla.name: Tenkaichi Budokai — Squat
tenkaichi-budokai-sentadilla.description: A 16-week tournament prep with a squat focus. Exact percentages of your 1RM, mesocycle periodization, deload before competition. 4 days per week. Inspired by Boris Sheiko's methodology.

tenkaichi-budokai-press-banca.name: Tenkaichi Budokai — Bench Press
tenkaichi-budokai-press-banca.description: A 16-week tournament prep with a bench focus. Exact percentages of your 1RM, multiple bench variations. 4 days per week. Inspired by Boris Sheiko's methodology.

tenkaichi-budokai-peso-muerto.name: Tenkaichi Budokai — Deadlift
tenkaichi-budokai-peso-muerto.description: A 16-week tournament prep with a deadlift focus. Deficit, blocks, chains, bands — every deadlift variation. 4 days per week. Inspired by Boris Sheiko's methodology.

tenkaichi-budokai-solo-banca.name: Tenkaichi Budokai — Bench Only
tenkaichi-budokai-solo-banca.description: An 18-week prep focused entirely on the bench press. No competition squat or deadlift — all energy going into a single strike. 4 days per week. Inspired by Boris Sheiko's methodology.

tenkaichi-budokai-veterano.name: Tenkaichi Budokai — Veteran
tenkaichi-budokai-veterano.description: Sheiko's most popular program for experienced warriors. 4 prep mesocycles with moderate volume and a built-in 1RM test. Use your combat experience to reach the tournament at your best. 4 days per week. Inspired by Boris Sheiko's methodology.

furia-oscura.name: Dark Fury
furia-oscura.description: Train like a Saiyan: Push/Pull/Legs with A/B weekly alternation. 3 days/week, Hyperbolic Time Chamber style, double progression until you break your limits.

guest_banner.prompt: Create an account to save your progress
guest_banner.create_account_aria: Create account to save your progress

data_stored.title: Data We Store
data_stored.body: All training data (exercises, weights, sets, repetitions, and results) is stored locally in your browser's localStorage. This data never leaves your device unless you explicitly enable cloud sync.

cloud_sync.title: Cloud Sync (Optional)
cloud_sync.body: If you create an account, we store your email address and training data in a secure database (PostgreSQL). This allows synchronization between devices. Cloud sync is completely optional — the app works fully offline without an account.

google_login.title: Google Sign-In (Optional)
google_login.body: If you sign in with Google, we receive your email address and profile name from Google. We do not access your contacts, calendar, or any other Google data.

cookies.title: Cookies, Analytics, and Tracking
cookies.body_prefix: We only use a technical cookie necessary to maintain authenticated user sessions. We do not use analytics, tracking, or advertising cookies. No data is shared with advertisers or third parties. See our

delete_data.title: Delete Your Data
delete_data.local_body: Clear your browser's localStorage or use the "Reset All" option in the app.
delete_data.cloud_body: If you have an account and wish to delete your cloud data, contact us and we will delete your account and all associated data from our database.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions or data deletion requests, open an issue on the project repository or contact the maintainer.

what_are_cookies.title: What are cookies?
what_are_cookies.body: Cookies are small text files that websites store in your browser. They may be necessary for the technical functioning of the site or used for analytical or advertising purposes.

which_cookies.title: What cookies does Gravity Room use?
which_cookies.body: Gravity Room only uses a technical cookie strictly necessary for authentication functionality.
which_cookies.no_tracking: We do not use analytics, advertising, or tracking cookies of any kind.

table.name: Name
table.refresh_token_purpose: Maintain authenticated user session. Contains an opaque identifier (no personal data). It is httpOnly and not accessible by JavaScript.

third_party.title: Third-party cookies
third_party.body_prefix: When using Google sign-in, Google's service may set its own cookies during the authentication process. These cookies are managed by Google and subject to their
third_party.no_access: Gravity Room does not control or have access to such cookies.

local_storage.title: Local storage
local_storage.body: In addition to the cookie mentioned above, Gravity Room uses browser local storage to save display preferences and training data in guest mode. This data is never sent to any server and can be deleted by clearing your site data in your browser.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: a privacy-friendly web analytics service. Plausible does not use cookies, does not collect identifiable personal data, and does not track users between sessions. Aggregated data (page views, country of origin, device type) is used solely to improve the service.

legal_basis.title: Legal basis
legal_basis.body: is exempt from prior consent under article 22.2 of Law 34/2002 (LSSI-CE), as it is strictly necessary for the provision of the authentication service expressly requested by the user. This exemption is also recognized by Recital 66 of Directive 2009/136/EC and the guidelines of the European Data Protection Board.

disable_cookies.title: How to disable cookies?
disable_cookies.body_prefix: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Note that if you block the cookie
disable_cookies.body_suffix: you will not be able to maintain your session and will need to authenticate again on each visit. The app will continue to work in guest mode without cookies.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For questions about cookie usage, open an issue on the project repository or contact the maintainer.

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.description: This action will mark your account for deletion. Your data will be permanently deleted after 30 days.

cookie_banner.message: This site uses a technical cookie necessary to maintain your session. We do not use tracking cookies. We use Plausible Analytics (no cookies) to improve the service.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Reloading the page should fix it.

toast.provider_error: useToast must be used within ToastProvider

guest.provider_error: useGuest must be used within GuestProvider

empty.guest_body: Create a free account to save your progress and stick with your plan.
empty.no_program_body: Pick a program to start logging your training.
